prompt:
Decorative background texture — not strictly tileable. Square format.

Subject: A large faint cross-section view of tree rings — concentric, slightly irregular, hand-drawn quality, with rings emanating from the center outward. Background is deep ink-green #0B211D with the ring lines in muted warm gold #C0A35D at very low contrast (~15% visible), like a watermark.

This will be used as a section background or behind logos at low opacity. The center should be slightly visible but the rings extend off the edges. Style: clean Eastern xianxia, like a temple emblem watermark.

Avoid: bright colors, sharp lines, neon, modern vector look, busy details, photographic wood, text, characters, central focal point that competes with foreground content.
